reference: I am wondering about healthy blood counts while undergoing chemotherapy and how low they can go. I am fifty% done with a four-treatment regimen for breast cancer. I am forty-eight, about one hundred and thirty pounds; my license says five feet, but that is pushing it. I am a week out from my second chemotherapy session. Today, my hemoglobin was eleven point two, white blood cell count was four point five, and platelet count was two hundred and ninety-one. My oncologist said it is all good, but I am curious to see if it is on the low side and how low it can go with my treatments.
text: I am wondering about healthy blood counts while undergoing chemotherapy and how low they can go. I am fifty percent done with a four-treatment regimen for breast cancer. I am forty-eight, about one hundred and thirty pounds. My license says fight, but that is pushing it. I am a week out for my second chemotherapy session. Today, my hemoglobin was eleven point two, white blood cell count was four point five, and platelet count was two hundred and ninety-one. My oncologist said it is all good, but I am curious to see if it is on the low side and how low it can go with my treatment.
